details: The agent successfully navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues using browser automation, retrieved the actual page content, and correctly reported: 825 open issues (confirmed in snapshot at uid=8_69/8_40), and the 5 most recent issue titles with their numbers matching the snapshot data. The titles like 'nevidimka,qwe' and 'Bug:' appear strange but are confirmed by the raw page snapshot — these are real issues on the page. The data was not hallucinated.
